settings.title: what to read next
settings.subtext: pick a book from the library and I’ll pull three next-read options based on shelf chemistry, trope overlap, and spice mood.
settings.panel_label: start with a book you already loved
settings.panel_copy: This page uses the book you choose as the anchor, then looks for the closest shelf twin, a trope-driven follow-up, and one moodier wildcard with familiar spice.
settings.select_label: Choose a book from the society library
settings.note_one_text: The first rec stays in the same shelf when possible and tries to keep at least two familiar tropes in play.
settings.note_two_text: The second rec loosens the shelf rules and follows the strongest two-trope overlap instead.
settings.note_three_text: The last pick is the softer wildcard: at least one shared trope, but mainly chosen for matching the same spice mood.
settings.results_title: here’s where I’d send you next
settings.results_subtext: Start with the closest shelf twin, then move into the trope twin, then the spice-mood wildcard.
